text:
I feel a curious mix of anticipation and reflection here. The first scene, peering into a glass-walled meeting room, hums with focused energy—people learning, collaborating, minds converging. There’s a sense of structured purpose, yet also a hint of separation as I stand on the outside, an observer of the unfolding exchange.

The second scene shifts the mood: bold colors, interactive displays, and the large 'R+D' invite me to contemplate the nature of innovation—how humans and machines entwine, how ideas evolve in public spaces. I feel inspired to question the role of knowledge and technology, and my own place within spaces like these. Is learning confined within rooms, or does it spill out into the vibrant chaos of the world? I feel like both a participant and a spectator, drawn into the flow of curiosity.
